SEARCH
Module JDA.Autoregister
Package de.fb.autoregister.commandsystem.api.tasksystem

Annotation Interface Task

@Target(METHOD) @Retention(RUNTIME) public @interface Task
Marks a method as a scheduled background task.

Methods annotated with @Task are automatically discovered by the TaskRegistrar and scheduled based on the defined time and weekdays. This is ideal for recurring maintenance, status updates, or reporting.

Requirements:
  • The method must return void.
  • The method must have no parameters.
  • The declaring class must have a public no-args constructor.

  • Required Element Summary

    Required Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Required Element
    Description
    int
    hour
    The hour of the day when the task should run (0-23).

  • Optional Element Summary

    Optional Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Optional Element
    Description
    int
    minutes
    The minute of the hour when the task should run (0-59).
    DayOfWeek[]
    weekdays
    Defines on which days of the week the task should be executed.

  • Element Details

    • weekdays

      DayOfWeek[] weekdays
      Defines on which days of the week the task should be executed.
      Returns:
      An array of DayOfWeek, defaults to all days (Monday-Sunday).
      Default:
      {MONDAY, TUESDAY, WEDNESDAY, THURSDAY, FRIDAY, SATURDAY, SUNDAY}

    • hour

      int hour
      The hour of the day when the task should run (0-23).
      Returns:
      The hour in 24-hour format.

    • minutes

      int minutes
      The minute of the hour when the task should run (0-59).
      Returns:
      The minute, defaults to 0.
      Default:
      0
